title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic GTM Product Manager Jared Sires built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that drafts customer replies in the user's own voice, using Claude Code. The tool helps sales representatives reduce administrative work.
